Australia - 20 somethin - absolute identity failure
channel.title: @lilith-and-halo.bsky.social - lilith-and-halo.bsky.social

item.description:
Cutte fennec foxboys with juicy dicks 🤩

Baddass catbitches with leaky tits 🤩

The perfect lover just for me 🥺

A #korps supervillain with the telekinetic power to generate and manipulate extreme magnetic fields in extreme close range. Korps engineers fit them with a space-tech composite barrel down the length of their outer forearm. With custom ferrite core projectiles they can become a living railgun

In the wise words of a post i just saw:

"Shout out digi legs, gotta be one of my favourite genders"
A home-grown chest is so much effort. 13 months strong #gym

What do we think the #Korps ∍⧽⧼∊ presence would be like in a Korpsigin Sydney - Australia? The country and city as a whole? 

I'd like to think east-coast Australia became a key space-industry hub for the Pacific ocean, enabling space-born weapons like the ice-ray-baring ISS.

Weening off my antidepressants. Already halved my dose in a week and feeling stable.

Not only stable, but i actually feel GREAT. Because i actually feel things again! 

Have been reading @runafjord.bsky.social 's Shear Force and its amazing how much more i feel. How much more anrgy at the tpa :p
Should i just dive in and start trying to write? I need to post it somewhere, otherwise its hard to stay motivated. Maybe this is an excuse to polish up my website and start posting there

God, the gym is the slowest Empire Enhancements ever

1 year and i dont even have subdermal reinforcement and skeletal enhancements, just this weird muscle stuff

#korps

Telepathic abilities to manipulate how you are peecieved across all senses. But be careful.. if you hold onto that ghost long enough, you may find the universe warp and bend to make that form the truth.

She was so pretty and kind.. picking you up off the floor when you stumbled and fell in the rave. The dim flashing lights dancing across her muzzle in cruel brilliance.

"There there, sweetie! You're okay!" She cooed with practiced ease

How were you supposed to know she was a Korps agent?

The urge to self-insert in the #korps universe...

What would my power be? Would i have a power? Or would i just be a particularly large nuisance for the TPA? 

What would my in-universe origin story be? 

Would i be the one with the leash?

Is there a #korps group chat for hopelessly interested individuals?

A discord? A telegram? Pls help a poor doggy

Forvever greatful @muttasaur.bsky.social for giving my purple dog life 💜

Next phase is Korps induction? :p
